name: Ice Make Refrigeration Limited
summary: Ice Make Refrigeration Limited operates as a refrigeration equipment manufacturer in India and internationally. The company offers its products under the categories of cold rooms and storage, commercial refrigeration, industrial refrigeration, and transport refrigeration products under the Ice Make, Bharat, and Trans Freez brand names. It provides cold room products, including cold room storages, solar cold rooms, glass door display chillers, refrigeration systems, ripening chambers, and blast freezers and chillers. The company also offers commercial refrigeration products, such as curd incubation chamber, ice cream plant, bulk milk chiller, batch pasteurizer, ageing vat, ice candy production machine, ice cream hardener, mini blast freezer and chiller, mortuary chamber, heat pump food dehydrator, and commercial freezer. In addition, it provides industrial refrigeration products comprising water chilling plants, air chillers, and ice building tanks; and transport refrigeration products consisting of refrigerated vehicles/reefer vans, eutectic mobile containers, and dry insulated container, as well as glycol and water chillers. The company offers cooling solutions and accessories to various industries, including dairy, ice cream, food processing, agriculture, pharmaceuticals, cold chains, logistics, hospitals, hospitality, retail, and others. Ice Make Refrigeration Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Gandhinagar, India.
